items.title: A unified continuous framework for two-player two-strategy games: Game-theoretic analysis of interactions
items.title_zh: 两人双策略博弈的统一连续框架：交互的博弈论分析
items.summary: Games with two players and two strategies are basic models used to investigate strategic interactions in the real world. These fundamental games, such as the prisoner’s dilemma, have shaped our understanding of cooperation and conflict, which are universal across both social and biological systems. However, players in these games are limited to binary choices, a simplification that fails to capture the continuous nature of real-world interactions. Moreover, social and biological interactions lack a mathematical description, and 2 × 2 games appear to be independent of one another. In this paper, we propose a unified continuous formulation for 2 × 2 games, which we term Linear Dualism Games (LDG). The strategy space of the LDG is divided into the cooperation domain and the defection domain. Supported by LDG, we present mathematical descriptions for three main types of interactions: competition, mutualism, and exploitation, and establish connections among 2 × 2 games. Interactions can vary across the different domains of the LDG. For example, in the prisoner’s dilemma, the interaction is competition in both the cooperation and defection domains, while in the stag hunt game, the interaction is mutualism in the cooperation domain and competition in the defection domain. Furthermore, the prisoner’s dilemma can be changed into the hawk-dove game by altering the interaction type in the defection domain from competition to mutualism. We also identify new 2 × 2 games that have not been discussed before, such as the battle of the allies, the battle of the married couple, and the conv…
items.title_en: A unified continuous framework for two-player two-strategy games: Game-theoretic analysis of interactions
items.title_bilingual: 两人双策略博弈的统一连续框架：交互的博弈论分析 / A unified continuous framework for two-player two-strategy games: Game-theoretic analysis of interactions
items.summary_zh: 具有两个玩家和两种策略的博弈是用于研究现实世界中策略交互的基本模型。这些基本博弈，例如囚徒困境，塑造了我们对合作与冲突的理解，它们在社会和生物系统中都是普遍存在的。然而，这些游戏中的玩家仅限于二元选择，这种简化无法捕捉现实世界交互的连续性。此外，社会和生物相互作用缺乏数学描述，2 × 2 游戏似乎是相互独立的。在本文中，我们提出了 2 × 2 博弈的统一连续公式，我们将其称为线性二元博弈（LDG）。 LDG的策略空间分为合作域和背叛域。在 LDG 的支持下，我们对三种主要类型的交互提供了数学描述：竞争、互利共生和剥削，并在 2 × 2 博弈之间建立了联系。 LDG 不同领域的交互可能有所不同。例如，在囚徒困境中，合作领域和叛逃领域的互动都是竞争，而在猎鹿游戏中，双方之间的互动是竞争。

items.title: An insight into mechanical properties of alkaline minerals (eitelite and shortite) deposited in Fengcheng Formation, Mahu Sag
items.title_zh: 玛湖凹陷风城组碱性矿物（硅钙石、钾长石）力学性质研究
items.summary: Mechanical properties of minerals in shale plays would impact the design of hydraulic fracturing, a major tool to increase production from unconventional shale reservoirs. Unlike other lacustrine shale formations in China which are mainly formed in freshwater lake environment, Fengcheng Formation in the Mahu sag was deposited in a volcanic-alkali lake evaporation system with abundant alkaline minerals. However, up to date, the mechanical properties of these alkaline minerals are still unknown, which limits a proper stimulation operation design and implementation. In this study, several samples from the Fengcheng Formation were collected, characterized for their mineralogy, geochemical attributes, pore morphology via electron microscopy and mechanical properties (Young's modulus, hardness, fracture toughness) via nanoindentation testing. The results show that mechanical parameters (Young's modulus, hardness and fractures toughness) of eitelite are generally smaller than that of the shortite. Furthermore, mechanical parameters of eitelite and shortite were found close to that of the feldspar, making us consider them as brittle minerals and propose a modified brittleness index (BI) formula. Ultimately, mechanical properties of these alkaline minerals did not vary in each sample with points to the heterogeneous nature of such properties. Overall, this study is the first investigation of mechanical properties of alkaline minerals in Fengcheng Formation which can assist the hydraulic fracturing design in such area to ensure economic gains and avoid financial loss during field op…
items.title_en: An insight into mechanical properties of alkaline minerals (eitelite and shortite) deposited in Fengcheng Formation, Mahu Sag
items.title_bilingual: 玛湖凹陷风城组碱性矿物（硅钙石、钾长石）力学性质研究 / An insight into mechanical properties of alkaline minerals (eitelite and shortite) deposited in Fengcheng Formation, Mahu Sag

items.title: Beyond place cells: Specific and cooperative roles of hippocampal interneuron families in spatial coding
items.title_zh: 超越位置细胞：海马中间神经元家族在空间编码中的特异性和合作作用
items.summary: The hippocampus constructs a cognitive map for spatial and mental navigation, whose fundamental units are the place fields of pyramidal cells. Prevailing models attribute place field generation and flexibility (remapping) to excitatory circuits and their synaptic plasticity. In contrast, an alternative hypothesis posits that diverse inhibitory microcircuits critically shape place field properties through their family-specific, cooperative control of pyramidal neurons. However, testing this model has been technically challenging, as it requires simultaneously recording multiple interneuron types—a capability beyond the reach of conventional methods, which typically target only one or two families. Valero et al. recently overcame this limitation in Science by developing a machine-learning classifier that identifies interneuron families in large-scale recordings based on optogenetically tagged physiological features. By combining this classification with targeted manipulation, the authors demonstrated that interneuron families differentially and cooperatively regulate the place field properties of pyramidal neurons.
items.title_en: Beyond place cells: Specific and cooperative roles of hippocampal interneuron families in spatial coding
items.title_bilingual: 超越位置细胞：海马中间神经元家族在空间编码中的特异性和合作作用 / Beyond place cells: Specific and cooperative roles of hippocampal interneuron families in spatial coding
items.summary_zh: 海马体构建了一个用于空间和心理导航的认知地图，其基本单位是锥体细胞的位置场。流行的模型将位置场的生成和灵活性（重新映射）归因于兴奋性回路及其突触可塑性。相比之下，另一种假设认为，不同的抑制性微电路通过其对锥体神经元的家族特异性、协作控制来关键地塑造场所场特性。然而，测试该模型在技术上具有挑战性，因为它需要同时记录多种中间神经元类型——这种能力超出了传统方法的范围，传统方法通常只针对一两个家族。瓦莱罗等人。最近通过开发一种机器学习分类器克服了《科学》中的这一限制，该分类器可以根据光遗传学标记的生理特征来识别大规模记录中的中间神经元家族。通过将这种分类与有针对性的操作相结合，作者证明了中间神经元家族以差异性和协作性的方式调节锥体神经元的位置场特性。

items.title: Binocular vision fusion enhanced 3D NIR-II in vivo imaging of bone and vessel networks
items.title_zh: 双目视觉融合增强了骨和血管网络的 3D NIR-II 体内成像
items.summary: Taking advantages of weak light scattering and minimal amount of auto-fluorescence background, optical imaging through the second near-infrared window (NIR-II,1000–1700nm) allows resolving the microscopic structures in deep tissues. However, current 2D wide-field imaging systems cannot provide the axial resolution to reveal depth information and the lateral resolution thereof has been limited by the pixel numbers of NIR-II cameras. We aim to improve 3D in vivo imaging at a large field of view (FOV) to achieve high-resolution 3D imaging of bone and vessel simultaneously. We developed a 3D NIR-II imaging technique utilizing iterative convolutional sub-pixel image reconstruction (ICSP-IR) and convolutional neural networks (CNN) in a binocular system. The instrumentation and CNN powered data analytics enable 3D in vivo volumetric imaging with a lateral resolution of 153 μm and an axial resolution of 480 μm at a FOV of 42.5 x 53 x 14 mm3. High-resolution 3D imaging of both tibia structures and vessel networks can be simultaneously achieved by the 808-nm and 980-nm dual-beam excitations of NIR-Ⅱa type nanoparticles that emit at 1060 nm and NIR-Ⅱb type nanoparticles that emit at 1530 nm, respectively.
items.title_en: Binocular vision fusion enhanced 3D NIR-II in vivo imaging of bone and vessel networks
items.title_bilingual: 双目视觉融合增强了骨和血管网络的 3D NIR-II 体内成像 / Binocular vision fusion enhanced 3D NIR-II in vivo imaging of bone and vessel networks
items.summary_zh: 利用弱光散射和极少量的自发荧光背景，通过第二个近红外窗口（NIR-II，1000–1700nm）进行光学成像可以解析深层组织中的微观结构。然而，当前的2D宽视场成像系统无法提供揭示深度信息的轴向分辨率，并且其横向分辨率受到NIR-II相机的像素数量的限制。我们的目标是改进大视场 (FOV) 下的 3D 活体成像，以同时实现骨骼和血管的高分辨率 3D 成像。我们开发了一种在双目系统中利用迭代卷积亚像素图像重建 (ICSP-IR) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的 3D NIR-II 成像技术。仪器和 CNN 支持的数据分析可实现 3D 体内体积成像，在 42.5 x 53 x 14 mm3 的 FOV 下，横向分辨率为 153 μm，轴向分辨率为 480 μm。通过在 1060 nm 发射的 NIR-IIa 型纳米颗粒和在 1530 nm 发射的 NIR-IIb 型纳米颗粒的 808 nm 和 980 nm 双光束激发，可以同时实现胫骨结构和血管网络的高分辨率 3D 成像，…

items.title: Breaking the strength limit: Negative-excess-energy interfaces push Ni alloys toward theoretical strength
items.title_zh: 突破强度极限：负超能界面将镍合金推向理论强度
items.summary: The pursuit of metallic materials approaching their theoretical strength has long been hindered by interface instability at the nanoscale. A recent study by Li et al., writing in Science , reveals that introducing coherent interfaces with negative excess energy in Ni–Mo alloys enables sustained strengthening down to sub-nanometer scales. These energetically favorable interfaces achieve near-theoretical strength (∼5 GPa), marking a new paradigm in atomic-scale interface engineering for ultrahigh-performance metals.
items.title_en: Breaking the strength limit: Negative-excess-energy interfaces push Ni alloys toward theoretical strength
items.title_bilingual: 突破强度极限：负超能界面将镍合金推向理论强度 / Breaking the strength limit: Negative-excess-energy interfaces push Ni alloys toward theoretical strength
items.summary_zh: 长期以来，纳米尺度的界面不稳定性一直阻碍着金属材料接近其理论强度的发展。 Li等人最近在《科学》杂志上发表的一项研究表明，在Ni-Mo合金中引入具有负过剩能量的相干界面可以实现亚纳米尺度的持续强化。这些能量上有利的界面达到了接近理论的强度（∼5 GPa），标志着超高性能金属原子尺度界面工程的新范例。

items.title: Cerium(III) bromide hybrid with near-unity photoluminescence quantum efficiency for high-resolution and fast x-ray imaging
items.title_zh: 具有接近一致光致发光量子效率的溴化铈 (III) 杂化物，可实现高分辨率和快速 X 射线成像
items.summary: Trivalent lanthanide Ce(III) with a typical allowed 4f – 5d transition generally exhibits short decay time in a nanosecond level, beneficial to fast X-ray imaging applications. Herein, we rationally design and synthesize two zero-dimensional Ce 3+ based halide hybrids, namely [Emim] 3 CeBr 6 and [Emmim] 3 CeBr 6 (Emim = 1-ethyl-3-methylimidazolium; Emmim = 1-ethyl-2,3-dimethylimidazolium), both exhibiting intense broad-band violet-to-blue emission originated from Ce 3+ with near-unity photoluminescence quantum yield. The short nanosecond decay time and the heavy atom effect further inspire us to explore their X-ray scintillation performance. Up to 48,000 photons MeV -1 light yield is derived together with the low detection limit (around 626 nGy s -1 ), and thus a composite film is fabricated to achieve dynamic fast X-ray imaging. This study enlarges the family of scintillators in Ce(III)-based halide hybrid with short decay time. Two cerium bromide hybrids [Emim] 3 CeBr 6 and [Emmim] 3 CeBr 6 (Emim = 1-ethyl-3-methylimidazolium; Emmim = 1-ethyl-2,3-dimethylimidazolium) exhibit intense 4f – 5d violet-to-blue emission from Ce 3+ with photoluminescence quantum yield of 100%. The short nanosecond decay time and the heavy atom endows two compounds with high-resolution and fast X-ray imaging property with light yield up to 48,000 pH MeV -1 and low detection limit of 626 nGy s -1 .

items.title: Comparison of infrared and solid-state <sup>13</sup>C NMR spectroscopy for assessing soil organic carbon composition following hydrofluoric acid treatment
items.title_zh: 红外和固态<sup>13</sup>C NMR光谱评估氢氟酸处理后土壤有机碳组成的比较
items.summary: • HF treatment had little impact on SOC molecular composition in 13 C NMR analysis. • FTIR signals for carbohydrate C − O and aliphatic C − H were enhanced by HF treatment. • HF treatment improved FTIR- 13 C NMR correlation for carbohydrates and aliphatics. Although Fourier transform infrared (FTIR) spectroscopy is a common tool for analyzing the molecular composition of soil organic carbon (SOC), soil silicate minerals often interfere with the carbohydrate bands of FTIR spectra. Extraction with hydrofluoric acid (HF) to remove soil mineral phases is a routine treatment prior to SOC composition analysis using solid-state 13 C nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) spectroscopy. However, it is unclear whether HF pretreatment is suitable for FTIR spectroscopy and if the functional groups identified in the FTIR and NMR spectra are comparable after HF treatment. Utilizing a diverse array of soils from 47 upland forest sites across China, we investigated the correlations of organic molecular components quantified by FTIR spectroscopy before and after HF treatment with the widely used NMR spectra. Our results showed that HF treatment had little impact on SOC molecular composition as assessed by NMR spectroscopy. For HF-treated samples, carbohydrates (∼1,030 cm −1 ) and aliphatics (∼2,850 and ∼2,920 cm −1 ) measured by FTIR showed stronger correlations with NMR data ( r = 0.75 and 0.69, respectively) compared with untreated samples ( r = 0.35 and 0.29, respectively), likely due to effective mineral phase removal. Additionally, the SOC degradation index, expressed as carbohydrate-to-ali…
items.title_en: Comparison of infrared and solid-state <sup>13</sup>C NMR spectroscopy for assessing soil organic carbon composition following hydrofluoric acid treatment
items.title_bilingual: 红外和固态<sup>13</sup>C NMR光谱评估氢氟酸处理后土壤有机碳组成的比较 / Comparison of infrared and solid-state <sup>13</sup>C NMR spectroscopy for assessing soil organic carbon composition following hydrofluoric acid treatment
items.summary_zh: • HF 处理对 13 C NMR 分析中的 SOC 分子组成几乎没有影响。 • HF 处理增强了碳水化合物 C – O 和脂肪族 C – H 的 FTIR 信号。 • HF 处理改善了碳水化合物和脂肪族化合物的 FTIR- 13 C NMR 相关性。尽管傅里叶变换红外 (FTIR) 光谱是分析土壤有机碳 (SOC) 分子组成的常用工具，但土壤硅酸盐矿物经常干扰 FTIR 光谱的碳水化合物谱带。在使用固态 13 C 核磁共振 (NMR) 光谱分析 SOC 成分之前，用氢氟酸 (HF) 萃取以去除土壤矿物相是一种常规处理方法。然而，尚不清楚 HF 预处理是否适用于 FTIR 光谱，以及 HF 处理后 FTIR 和 NMR 光谱中鉴定的官能团是否具有可比性。我们利用中国 47 个高地森林点的各种土壤，研究了 HF 处理前后通过 FTIR 光谱定量的有机分子成分与广泛使用的 NMR 光谱的相关性。我们的结果表明，经评估，HF 处理对 SOC 分子组成几乎没有影响……

items.title: Cross-population white matter atlas creation for concurrent mapping of brain connections in neonates and adults with diffusion MRI tractography
items.title_zh: 创建跨群体白质图谱，用于通过扩散 MRI 纤维束成像同时绘制新生儿和成人的大脑连接图
items.summary: Comparing white matter (WM) connections between adults and neonates using diffusion MRI (dMRI) can enhance our understanding of typical brain development and help identify potential biomarkers for neurological disorders. Brain WM atlases are valuable tools for facilitating population-wise comparisons, allowing for the identification of WM differences between adult and neonatal brains. Currently, existing studies typically rely on atlases created for a specific population (either neonates or adults), where each atlas resides in its own space, preventing direct comparisons across populations. A cross-population WM atlas, created using both adult and neonatal imaging data, that allows for the concurrent mapping of brain connections in the two populations is still lacking. Therefore, in this study, we propose the neonatal/adult brain atlas, namely NABA, a WM tractography atlas that is built using dMRI data from both neonates and adults. NABA is created using a robust, data-driven tractography fiber clustering pipeline, allowing for group-wise WM atlasing across diverse populations, despite potential anatomical variability in the WM. This atlas serves as a standardized template for parcellating WM tractography in new individuals, enabling direct comparisons of WM tracts across the two populations. With the atlas, we perform a comparative study to examine the WM development of the neonates in comparison to the adult data. Our study encompasses four key analyses: (1) evaluating the feasibility of joint WM mapping between neonatal and adult brains using the atlas, (2) characterizi…

items.title: Deciphering molecular inputs to CRH neurons from POMC neurons
items.title_zh: 破译 POMC 神经元对 CRH 神经元的分子输入
items.summary: Classical neurophysiological studies have highlighted the adaptive role of stress hormones in energy homeostasis and survival-related behaviors in response to intrinsic biological factors and external stimuli. Subsequently, viral tracing research in mice has uncovered that physically restrained, activated corticotropin-releasing hormone neurons (CRHNs) in the hypothalamic paraventricular nucleus (PVN) have direct synaptic input from proopiomelanocortin (POMC) neurons in the arcuate nucleus (ARC), which are classically known to be associated with satiety and autonomic adaptations in metabolic responses. However, the regulatory mechanism, particularly neurotransmitter-based complex connections, still needs to be thoroughly explained. In this study, we have leveraged an integrative approach to comprehend neuron-to-neuron interactions by analyzing publicly available single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) datasets and uncovered a dominance of glutamatergic signaling in POMC-CRHNs interactions, which may modulate the autonomic stress response. To explore the evolutionary conservation of this interaction, we further analyzed the human hypothalamic scRNA-seq dataset, confirming that glutamatergic signaling remains dominant with a wider range of ligands from POMC neurons compared to GABAergic signaling. This was further confirmed by viral tracing experiments, indicating that restraint-activated POMC neurons primarily employ significant glutamatergic gene expression. Our study explains molecular mechanisms underpinning glutamatergic signaling in POMC-CRHNs in stress-responsive hypot…

items.summary_zh: 经典神经生理学研究强调了应激激素在响应内在生物因素和外部刺激的能量稳态和生存相关行为中的适应性作用。随后，对小鼠的病毒追踪研究发现，下丘脑室旁核（PVN）中物理抑制的、激活的促肾上腺皮质激素释放激素神经元（CRHN）具有来自弓状核（ARC）中的阿黑皮素原（POMC）神经元的直接突触输入，传统上已知这些神经元与代谢反应中的饱腹感和自主适应有关。然而，其调节机制，特别是基于神经递质的复杂连接，仍然需要彻底解释。在这项研究中，我们利用综合方法通过分析公开的单细胞 RNA 测序 (scRNA-seq) 数据集来理解神经元与神经元之间的相互作用，并发现谷氨酸信号在 POMC-CRHN 相互作用中占主导地位，这可能会调节自主神经应激反应。为了探索这种相互作用的进化保守性，我们进一步分析了人类下丘脑 scRNA-seq 数据集，确认 gluta…

items.title: Decreasing groundwater temperature relieves seawater intrusion in coastal aquifers
items.title_zh: 地下水温度下降缓解了沿海含水层的海水入侵
items.summary: Fresh submarine groundwater discharge (FSGD), as an important natural and renewable water resource, occurs along much of the global coast but finally gets lost into the sea. Exploiting FSGD, however, could induce seawater intrusion in coastal aquifers. Here, we show that decreasing groundwater temperature (by extracting fresh groundwater from and recharging cooled and more viscous water back into coastal aquifers) can relieve seawater intrusion and lead to safe exploitation of FSGD, based on laboratory experiments and numerical simulations. The performance of groundwater cooling can be approximately quantified by an analytical solution which shows its dependence on the FSGD extraction ratio and temperature contrast. The seawater retreat ratio (ratio of the seawater retreat distance to the length of seawater intrusion prior to water extraction) can reach 47.4% with groundwater cooling and without fresh groundwater exploitation. Furthermore, without incurring further seawater intrusion, groundwater cooling can lead to 35.7% FSGD exploitation.
items.title_en: Decreasing groundwater temperature relieves seawater intrusion in coastal aquifers
items.title_bilingual: 地下水温度下降缓解了沿海含水层的海水入侵 / Decreasing groundwater temperature relieves seawater intrusion in coastal aquifers
items.summary_zh: 新鲜的海底地下水排放（FSGD）作为一种重要的天然和可再生水资源，发生在全球大部分海岸，但最终消失在海洋中。然而，利用 FSGD 可能会导致海水入侵沿海含水层。在此，我们基于实验室实验和数值模拟表明，降低地下水温度（通过从冷却的地下水中提取淡水并将冷却后的粘性水重新注入沿海含水层）可以缓解海水入侵并实现 FSGD 的安全开采。地下水冷却的性能可以通过解析解来近似量化，该解析解显示了其对 FSGD 提取率和温度对比的依赖性。在地下水冷却、不开采地下水的情况下，海水退缩率（海水退缩距离与抽水前海水侵入长度之比）可达47.4%。此外，在不引起进一步海水入侵的情况下，地下水冷却可实现 35.7% 的 FSGD 开采。

items.title: Disentangling complex language contact and admixture in the broad Gansu-Qinghai region
items.title_zh: 解开广大甘青地区复杂的语言接触和混合
items.summary: Language evolution in the Gansu-Qinghai (GQ) region provides a key perspective for understanding cultural development along the eastern Silk Road. Previous genetic and archaeological studies have revealed complex, multi-ethnic interactions in this region, shaped by migration and sociocultural exchange. However, the lack of structured linguistic data and computational tools for studying GQ language contacts has limited rigorous analysis of sociocultural evolution. Here, we presented a new hybrid dataset of phonological and morpho-syntactic features from languages sampled across the GQ region. We introduced a computational framework to assess language contact and admixture, allowing us to quantify interaction among GQ languages and trace their origins. Our results showed that GQ languages exhibit distinct contact patterns in their phonological and morpho-syntactic systems, with some languages displaying clear evidence of mixture. Using a new statistical method, Trait Sharing Among Languages ( TSAL ), based on tree topology, we identified significant influences from Sinitic, Tibetan, Mongolic, and Turkic languages in shaping the GQ linguistic diversity. These findings highlight the GQ region as a linguistic convergence zone on the eastern Silk Road, providing a foundation for quantitative research on language contact and admixture. Our work enhances the linguistic perspective on cultural evolution in the GQ region and supports future interdisciplinary studies that integrate languages, genes, and material cultures.

items.title_bilingual: 解开广大甘青地区复杂的语言接触和混合 / Disentangling complex language contact and admixture in the broad Gansu-Qinghai region

items.title: Efficient access authentication for quantum communication network with digital certificates
items.title_zh: 基于数字证书的量子通信网络高效接入认证
items.summary: Digital certificate offers an efficient way to realize the access authentication which safeguards the first line of secure communication. In this paper, we propose an access authentication scheme with digital certificates based on post-quantum standards published by the National Institute of Standards and Technology for quantum communication networks. Specifically, we experimentally demonstrate the secure access authentication of the quantum channel by verifying the signatures encoded in quantum states in a quantum secure direct communication network. Only the post-quantum digital signature algorithm is needed in the experiment. Together with secure relays, we envision the establishment of a large-scale quantum-secure communication network in the future.
items.title_en: Efficient access authentication for quantum communication network with digital certificates
items.title_bilingual: 基于数字证书的量子通信网络高效接入认证 / Efficient access authentication for quantum communication network with digital certificates
items.summary_zh: 数字证书提供了一种高效的接入认证方式，保障了安全通信的第一道防线。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于美国国家标准与技术研究所发布的量子通信网络后量子标准的数字证书访问认证方案。具体来说，我们通过验证量子安全直接通信网络中量子态编码的签名来实验演示量子通道的安全访问认证。实验中只需要后量子数字签名算法。与安全中继一起，我们设想未来建立一个大规模的量子安全通信网络。

items.title: Electroresistance mechanism of memristive Cu<sub>2</sub>S thin films
items.title_zh: 忆阻Cu<sub>2</sub>S薄膜的电阻机制
items.summary: Cu 2 S has been widely used as the resistive-layer material of memristors with the advantage of low-power consumption since the Cu-ions have high mobility and migrate quickly under the applied electric field or current. However, the resistance switching mechanisms remain unclear as direct experimental evidence is still lacking. Here, we prepare several prototypes of metal-Cu 2 S-metal memristors, where the resistive layer is a thin film of polycrystalline Cu 2 S fabricated by a simple magnetron sputtering process. By fitting the resistive curves, space charge limited conduction (SCLC) and electrochemical metallization (ECM) are identified in devices using different electrodes and compliance currents. The microstructural evolutions of the devices in their working conditions are then studied by in-situ transmission electron microscopy (TEM) to directly observe the formation and rupture of the electrically conductive pathways. We find the resistance switch at small current compliance is caused by the phase transformation between γ (L)-Cu 2 S phase and the Cu-deficiency γ (D)-Cu 2-x S phase (corresponding to SCLC mechanism). Meanwhile, the origin of resistance change at a large current compliance is the formation of metal Cu filaments (corresponding to ECM mechanism). The study reveals the underlying resistive mechanisms of Cu 2 S, providing insights for its potential applications as the resistive material in high-performance memristors.

items.title_bilingual: 忆阻Cu<sub>2</sub>S薄膜的电阻机制 / Electroresistance mechanism of memristive Cu<sub>2</sub>S thin films
items.summary_zh: Cu 2 S由于Cu离子具有高迁移率并且在施加的电场或电流下快速迁移而被广泛用作忆阻器的电阻层材料，具有低功耗的优点。然而，由于仍缺乏直接的实验证据，耐药转换机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们制备了几种金属-Cu 2 S-金属忆阻器原型，其中电阻层是通过简单的磁控溅射工艺制造的多晶Cu 2 S薄膜。通过拟合电阻曲线，可以识别使用不同电极和顺应电流的设备中的空间电荷限制传导（SCLC）和电化学金属化（ECM）。然后通过原位透射电子显微镜（TEM）研究器件在工作条件下的微观结构演变，以直接观察导电通路的形成和破裂。我们发现小电流柔量下的电阻切换是由γ(L)-Cu 2 S相和缺铜γ(D)-Cu 2-x S相之间的相变引起的(对应于SCLC机制)。同时，大电流下电阻变化的根源...

items.title: Endogenous iron biomineralization in the mouse spleen of metabolic diseases
items.title_zh: 代谢性疾病小鼠脾脏内源性铁生物矿化
items.summary: As the most abundant essential trace element in our human bodies, iron plays essential roles in multiple physiological and pathological conditions, including oxygen transport, cancer, diabetes, Alzheimer's and Parkinson's diseases. Although it has been shown that iron can form particles in some bacteria, migrating birds and fish, whether iron biomineralization can also occur in mammals is still debated. Here we demonstrate that iron metabolism abnormalities in diseased mice can directly lead to endogenous iron biomineralization and particle formation in the spleen. Excessive iron accumulation leads to endogenous particle formation with an averaged size of ∼800 nm. In the spleens of severely diabetic mice, they accumulate in the red pulp region, where the red blood cells are recycled. This directly changes the magnetic property of the spleens and results in spleen damage in a gradient high magnetic field. Therefore, our findings not only demonstrate the existence of endogenous iron biomineralization in metabolic diseases, but also set up a direct link among iron accumulation, magnetic property and magnetic responses of animal organs, which may also be applied in other iron metabolism-related diseases including cancer and Alzheimer's disease.
items.title_en: Endogenous iron biomineralization in the mouse spleen of metabolic diseases
items.title_bilingual: 代谢性疾病小鼠脾脏内源性铁生物矿化 / Endogenous iron biomineralization in the mouse spleen of metabolic diseases
items.summary_zh: 作为人体内最丰富的必需微量元素，铁在多种生理和病理条件下发挥着重要作用，包括氧运输、癌症、糖尿病、阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病。尽管已经证明铁可以在一些细菌、候鸟和鱼类中形成颗粒，但铁生物矿化是否也可以在哺乳动物中发生仍存在争议。在这里，我们证明患病小鼠的铁代谢异常可以直接导致脾脏中内源性铁生物矿化和颗粒形成。过多的铁积累会导致平均尺寸约为 800 nm 的内源颗粒形成。在严重糖尿病小鼠的脾脏中，它们积聚在红髓区域，红细胞在这里被回收。这直接改变了脾脏的磁性，导致梯度高磁场中的脾脏损伤。因此，我们的研究结果不仅证明了代谢疾病中内源性铁生物矿化的存在，而且还建立了动物器官的铁积累、磁性和磁反应之间的直接联系，这也可能应用于其他铁代谢......

items.title: Enhancing the high-cycle fatigue performance of GH4169 alloy by eliminating structural stress concentration through high-energy impact composite modification
items.title_zh: 高能冲击复合改性消除结构应力集中提高GH4169合金的高周疲劳性能
items.summary: Despite the advancements of traditional surface treatments like shot peening (SP) and laser shock peening (LSP) in enhancing the fatigue life of GH4169 superalloy, these techniques remain limited, particularly under high-stress concentration conditions. This study introduces a novel high-energy impact composite modification method that integrates SP and LSP to comprehensively address the fatigue strength sensitivity to stress concentration, a persistent issue for GH4169 in high-cycle fatigue applications. For the modified specimens, the fatigue limit under high-stress concentration conditions of Kt = 3 increased from 215 MPa to 517 MPa, more than doubling. Compared to grinding, composite modification shifts fatigue crack initiation from the surface to subsurface regions, demonstrating superior fatigue resistance. The high-intensity surface modification eliminates structural stress concentration as the primary factor determining the fatigue life of the material. The concentrated stress at the carbide phase interfaces within the material, which cannot be sufficiently weakened by residual compressive stress, becomes the new weak point. The study concludes that high-energy impact composite modification offers a viable method to enhance the durability and performance of GH4169 superalloys in demanding applications.

items.title: Genetic and linguistic landscapes of Gansu-Qinghai populations
items.title_zh: 甘青人群的遗传和语言景观
items.summary: The Gansu-Qinghai (GQ) region is a critical Eurasian contact zone with exceptional linguistic and genetic diversity. However, genomic studies integrating genetic and linguistic evidence in areas with intensive language mixing remain limited. We conducted fine-scale genomic analyses on 153 new samples from four linguistically mixing or mixed regions: Linxia and Xiahe in Gansu, and Gan'gou and Wutun in Qinghai. Our findings reveal three primary ancestral components: Yellow River, western Eurasian steppe, and Tibetan Plateau (TP)-related lineages. While non-Han populations show pronounced genetic heterogeneity and varying patterns of language maintenance, Han populations exhibit asymmetric convergence. Specifically, the Wutun Han show concordant genetic and linguistic shifts, whereas other Han groups exhibit linguistic structural convergence without corresponding gene flow. Widespread east-west admixture was detected in both Han Chinese and non-Han populations from the GQ region, primarily dating to the Tang/Song and Yuan Dynasties. Together, our interdisciplinary genetic-linguistic framework reveals complex and asymmetric processes underlying population interaction and language evolution in the GQ contact zone.
items.title_en: Genetic and linguistic landscapes of Gansu-Qinghai populations
items.title_bilingual: 甘青人群的遗传和语言景观 / Genetic and linguistic landscapes of Gansu-Qinghai populations
items.summary_zh: 甘青（GQ）地区是欧亚大陆的重要接触区，具有特殊的语言和遗传多样性。然而，在语言混合密集的地区整合遗传和语言证据的基因组研究仍然有限。我们对来自四个语言混合或混合地区（甘肃临夏和夏河，以及青海甘沟和乌屯）的 153 个新样本进行了精细基因组分析。我们的研究结果揭示了三个主要的祖先组成部分：黄河、欧亚西部草原和青藏高原（TP）相关谱系。非汉族群体表现出明显的遗传异质性和不同的语言维持模式，而汉族群体则表现出不对称的趋同。具体来说，乌屯汉族表现出一致的遗传和语言转变，而其他汉族则表现出语言结构趋同，但没有相应的基因流动。在 GQ 地区的汉族和非汉族人群中都发现了广泛的东西方混合，主要可追溯到唐/宋和元时期。总之，我们的跨学科遗传语言框架揭示了人口互动和语言进化背后复杂且不对称的过程……

items.title: Global synchronous increase in light-saturated and peak vegetation productivity
items.title_zh: 全球光饱和和峰值植被生产力同步增长
items.summary: Terrestrial gross primary productivity (GPP), which refers to the photosynthetic uptake of CO 2 by leaves, increases with incident irradiance and plateaus when leaves become light-saturated (GPP sat ). While evidence suggests enhanced peak vegetation productivity (GPP max ) since the 1980s, the existence of a light-saturation constraint on this enhancement remains unclear. Here, we combine the FLUXNET network’s 1269 site-years measurements with a flux-based gridded dataset to construct the first observationally derived light-response curves for global vegetation productivity. Our results show a synchronous increase of GPP max and GPP sat during the study period. There is convergence to a common ratio between GPP max and GPP sat , with averaged ratio values of about 80% across global biomes. In particular, GPP max was less light-saturated in evergreen broadleaved forests, suggesting significant potential for further productivity. The atmospheric CO 2 fertilization effect was the primary driver of the synchronous increase in GPP sat and GPP max , followed by temperature. Future projections by CMIP6 models indicate a continuing increase in GPP max through the end of the 21st century. These findings illuminate the crucial role that rising peak and light-saturated vegetation productivity will play in sequestering atmospheric CO 2 under future climate change scenarios.
items.title_en: Global synchronous increase in light-saturated and peak vegetation productivity
items.title_bilingual: 全球光饱和和峰值植被生产力同步增长 / Global synchronous increase in light-saturated and peak vegetation productivity
items.summary_zh: 陆地总初级生产力 (GPP) 是指叶子对 CO 2 的光合作用吸收，随着入射辐照度的增加而增加，并且当叶子达到光饱和时达到稳定状态 (GPP sat )。虽然有证据表明自 20 世纪 80 年代以来植被生产力峰值 (GPP max ) 有所提高，但这种增强是否存在光饱和度限制仍不清楚。在这里，我们将 FLUXNET 网络的 1269 个站点年测量值与基于通量的网格数据集相结合，构建了第一个观测得出的全球植被生产力的光响应曲线。我们的结果显示，在研究期间，GPP max 和 GPP sat 同步增加。 GPP max 和 GPP sat 之间存在一个共同比率，全球生物群落的平均比率值约为 80%。特别是，常绿阔叶林中的 GPP max 光饱和度较低，这表明进一步提高生产力的潜力巨大。大气CO 2 施肥效应是GPP sat 和GPP max 同步增加的主要驱动力，其次是温度。 CMIP6 模型的未来预测表明，到 21 世纪末，GPP 最大值将持续增加……

items.title: Graphene oxide-supported berberine and aloe-emodin nanocomposites for dual-drug release and antimicrobial therapy
items.title_zh: 氧化石墨烯支持的小檗碱和芦荟大黄素纳米复合材料用于双药物释放和抗菌治疗
items.summary: Enhanced drug resistance of Staphylococcus aureus (S. aureus) caused by antibiotic abuse brings serious safety concern. Herein, we report a nanodrug delivery strategy targeting S. aureus and achieve efficient antimicrobial therapy. First, the S. aureus-specific aptamer is conjugated with graphene oxide (GO), followed by the assembly of berberine (BBR) and aloe-emodin (AE). The combined nanodrugs with optimization ratio exhibit excellent targeted antibacterial effect on S. aureus, which is reflected by gene expressions and survival rates. Meanwhile, satisfactory safety evaluation is observed in a wide concentration range. The results of mouse mastitis model further demonstrate successful in vivo targeting of S. aureus and effective alleviation of S. aureus perfusion caused damage. This study not only provides a novel idea for the nanodrug delivery system, but also broadens the application prospect of Traditional Chinese Medicine in antimicrobial therapy.
items.title_en: Graphene oxide-supported berberine and aloe-emodin nanocomposites for dual-drug release and antimicrobial therapy
items.title_bilingual: 氧化石墨烯支持的小檗碱和芦荟大黄素纳米复合材料用于双药物释放和抗菌治疗 / Graphene oxide-supported berberine and aloe-emodin nanocomposites for dual-drug release and antimicrobial therapy
items.summary_zh: 抗生素滥用导致金黄色葡萄球菌（S. aureus）耐药性增强，带来严重的安全问题。在此，我们报告了一种针对金黄色葡萄球菌的纳米药物递送策略，并实现了有效的抗菌治疗。首先，将金黄色葡萄球菌特异性适体与氧化石墨烯 (GO) 缀合，然后组装小檗碱 (BBR) 和芦荟大黄素 (AE)。配比优化的组合纳米药物对金黄色葡萄球菌表现出优异的靶向抗菌效果，这体现在基因表达和存活率上。同时，在较宽的浓度范围内观察到令人满意的安全性评价。小鼠乳腺炎模型的结果进一步证明体内成功靶向金黄色葡萄球菌，并有效减轻金黄色葡萄球菌灌注造成的损伤。该研究不仅为纳米药物递送系统提供了新的思路，也拓宽了中药在抗菌治疗中的应用前景。

items.title: High-performance breathable magnetic core for high-frequency power electronic systems
items.title_zh: 用于高频电力电子系统的高性能透气磁芯
items.summary: The magnetic components (inductors and transformers) that consist of magnetic cores and windings play an important role in power electronic systems. The development of fast-switching semiconductor devices has led to an increase in the working frequencies of power electronic systems. However, high-frequency magnetic flux causes severe loss and heat generation in magnetic cores. This heat is difficult to dissipate owing to the typical solid structure of magnetic cores. Consequently, the risk of heat-induced damage has increased in power electronic systems. Magnetic materials with low conductivities may reduce loss and temperature rise. However, they increase the volume/weight and cost. To solve this problem, we propose a high-performance breathable magnetic core based on the magnetic flux skin effect with magductance. This can reduce the amount of magnetic materials, volume, and weight and facilitate loss reduction and heat exchange. In addition, it provides a new avenue for the study, design, and optimal production of various electromagnetic devices.
items.title_en: High-performance breathable magnetic core for high-frequency power electronic systems
items.title_bilingual: 用于高频电力电子系统的高性能透气磁芯 / High-performance breathable magnetic core for high-frequency power electronic systems
items.summary_zh: 由磁芯和绕组组成的磁性元件（电感器和变压器）在电力电子系统中发挥着重要作用。快速开关半导体器件的发展导致电力电子系统工作频率的提高。然而，高频磁通量会导致磁芯严重损耗和发热。由于磁芯的典型固体结构，这种热量很难散发。因此，电力电子系统中热致损坏的风险增加了。低电导率的磁性材料可以减少损耗和温升。然而，它们增加了体积/重量和成本。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于磁通集肤效应和磁导率的高性能透气磁芯。这可以减少磁性材料的数量、体积和重量，并有利于减少损耗和热交换。此外，它为各种电磁器件的研究、设计和优化生产提供了新的途径。

items.title: High-pressure synthesis and high-performance half metallicity of quadruple perovskite oxide DyCu<sub>3</sub>Fe<sub>2</sub>Re<sub>2</sub>O<sub>12</sub>
items.title_zh: 四重钙钛矿氧化物DyCu<sub>3</sub>Fe<sub>2</sub>Re<sub>2</sub>O<sub>12</sub>的高压合成及高性能半金属性
items.summary: The A - and B -site ordered quadruple perovskite oxide DyCu 3 Fe 2 Re 2 O 12 with cubic Pn -3 symmetry was synthesized under high-pressure and high-temperature conditions. The material experiences a sharp long-range ferrimagnetic transition arising from the strong superexchange antiferromagnetic interactions of Cu-Re and Fe-Re at a high Curie temperature ( T C ≈ 660 K). Owing to the influence at lower temperatures of the antiferromagnetic ordering of the Dy 3+ occupying the A -site, the susceptibility of DyCu 3 Fe 2 Re 2 O 12 decreases continuously below 50 K, which is essentially different from that of the isostructural compound LaCu 3 Fe 2 Re 2 O 12 . Moreover, in the presence of a magnetic field, the A -site Dy 3+ spins are readily transformed into the ferromagnetic state from the antiferromagnetic ground state. Thus, the saturated magnetic moment of DyCu 3 Fe 2 Re 2 O 12 is sharply enhanced from 7.0 μ B /f.u. at 300 K to 14 μ B /f.u. at 2 K by applying a magnetic field of 7 T. Theoretical calculations suggest that DyCu 3 Fe 2 Re 2 O 12 is a half-metallic ferrimagnet with a spin-up band gap of approximately 2.0 eV. The combination of the high Curie temperature, wide half-metallic energy gap, and large magnetic moment makes DyCu 3 Fe 2 Re 2 O 12 promising for potential applications in advanced spintronic devices. Half metals have promising applications in advanced spintronic devices because of their unique band structure. We synthesized a new high-performance half metal DyCu 3 Fe 2 Re 2 O 12 with a high Curie temperature TC = 660 K. Moreover, at high magnetic field, the…

items.title: Highly diverse diazotrophs drive high N<sub>2</sub> fixation rates in a shallow submarine hydrothermal system
items.title_zh: 高度多样化的固氮生物在浅海海底热液系统中驱动高 N<sub>2</sub> 固定率
items.summary: Dinitrogen (N2) fixation provides nitrogen sources supporting active chemoautotrophic processes in submarine hydrothermal systems. Here, the diazotrophic phylogenetic diversity and N2 fixation profile were investigated in depth along a sharp biogeochemical gradient from the hydrothermal vents to ambient seawater in a shallow submarine hydrothermal system (SHS) off Kueishantao Islet, Taiwan. Diazotrophic community compositions in the SHS covered all four known nifH clusters (I, II, III, and IV) and contained both characteristics of diazotrophic communities in deep-sea hydrothermal systems and terrestrial geothermal systems. The seawater around the vents was primarily dominated by nifH phylotypes affiliated with chemolithotrophic sulfur-oxidizing and iron-reducing bacteria. In contrast, in the seawater directly above the hydrothermal vents, the nifH community markedly contained diverse heterotrophic bacteria. The analysis, which focused on amino acid composition, protein spatial structure, and the possible co-occurrence of alternative nitrogenases in the presence of molybdenum-nitrogenase, further revealed that diazotrophic nitrogenase found around the hydrothermal vents exhibits potential molecular adaptations to high temperature, low pH, and sulfur-rich conditions. The relatively low N2 fixation rates (NFRs) were observed around the vents, where high concentrations of inorganic nitrogen compounds were present. However, notably, high NFRs were detected in seawater directly above the hydrothermal vents, which were 2–5 times higher than those at the reference site. The abunda…

items.title: Honeycomb-like nitrogen-doped ultramicroporous biochar for efficient and robust CO<sub>2</sub> capture
items.title_zh: 蜂窝状氮掺杂超微孔生物炭可高效、稳健地捕获 CO<sub>2</sub>
items.summary: • Biochar is synthesized by the one-pot carbonization-activation method from corncob. • Honeycomb-shaped biochar poses densely packed, nested, and compact ultramicropores. • Biochar shows graphite state with defects, functional groups, and sorption sites. • Remarkably high CO 2 sorption capacities reach up to 4.15 mmol/g at 1 bar and 298 K. • Biochar owns cyclic robustness with an attenuation rate of 13.98% over 20 cycles. Honeycomb-like nitrogen-doped ultramicroporous biochar for CO 2 capture is synthesized through various methods utilizing biomass, urea, and KOH as raw materials, nitridation agent, and porogen, respectively. The resulting materials meticulously undergo comprehensive characterization, revealing densely packed ultramicropores arranged in honeycomb-like patterns. The biochar predominantly exists in a graphite state of carbon with sufficient defects and abundant functional groups, along with a high nitrogen content, thereby providing numerous CO 2 sorption sites. High CO 2 sorption capacities are observed of 4.15 mmol/g (at 1 bar and 298 K) and 5.45 mmol/g (at 1 bar and 273 K) with sorption heat around 23 kJ/mol. The Sips model fitting displays satisfactory results at 298 K, indicating a maximum sorption capacity around 5.45 mmol/g, with regression correlation coefficients exceeding 0.9942. The sorption selectivity between CO 2 and N 2 is notably influenced by the surface nitrogen content present in the materials. These sorbents exhibit exceptional cyclic robustness during vacuum pressure swing cycles, with an attenuation rate as low as 13.98% over 20 cycles…

items.title: HyperG-PS: Voxel correlation modeling via hypergraph for LiDAR panoptic segmentation
items.title_zh: HyperG-PS：通过超图进行体素相关建模，用于 LiDAR 全景分割
items.summary: Light-detection-and-ranging (LiDAR) point cloud panoptic segmentation is a fundamental task in autonomous driving since it integrates the tasks of static environmental understanding and dynamic object identification, which have recently gained significant research interest. In this paper, we propose a bottom-up panoptic segmentation framework based on hypergraph learning, named HyperG-PS, which addresses the core problem of LiDAR panoptic segmentation by improving the cluster performance of instance segmentation. Specifically, our proposed method takes the raw LiDAR point cloud as input and utilizes a multi-view feature-extraction framework to fuse the 3D point cloud and 2D BEV features at the voxel level. Afterward, we model the correlation among voxels using a hypergraph to bridge the gap between voxel features and instance labels. We enhance the representation of voxels, thus improving the cluster algorithm performance while directly avoiding predicting point cloud offsets using our hypergraph-learning module. Extensive experiments on the SemanticKITTI and nuScenes datasets demonstrated the superior performance of HyperG-PS compared with state-of-the-art methods.
items.title_en: HyperG-PS: Voxel correlation modeling via hypergraph for LiDAR panoptic segmentation
items.title_bilingual: HyperG-PS：通过超图进行体素相关建模，用于 LiDAR 全景分割 / HyperG-PS: Voxel correlation modeling via hypergraph for LiDAR panoptic segmentation
items.summary_zh: 光检测和测距（LiDAR）点云全景分割是自动驾驶中的一项基本任务，因为它集成了静态环境理解和动态对象识别的任务，最近引起了人们的广泛研究兴趣。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于超图学习的自下而上的全景分割框架，称为HyperG-PS，它通过提高实例分割的集群性能来解决激光雷达全景分割的核心问题。具体来说，我们提出的方法以原始 LiDAR 点云作为输入，并利用多视图特征提取框架在体素级别融合 3D 点云和 2D BEV 特征。之后，我们使用超图对体素之间的相关性进行建模，以弥合体素特征和实例标签之间的差距。我们增强了体素的表示，从而提高了聚类算法的性能，同时避免使用我们的超图学习模块直接预测点云偏移。对 SemanticKITTI 和 nuScenes 数据集的大量实验证明了 HyperG-PS 与最先进的方法相比具有卓越的性能。

items.title: Interpretable machine learning models to predict cadmium in wheat for safe production and soil management
items.title_zh: 可解释的机器学习模型可预测小麦中的镉含量，以实现安全生产和土壤管理
items.summary: Accurate prediction of cadmium (Cd) concentrations in wheat grain is essential for ensuring food safety and sustainable agriculture. Here, we developed a predictive model using nine machine learning (ML) algorithms based on a dataset of 1,339 soil-wheat grain pairs, with a focus on soil properties. The results showed that the eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) model outperformed others, achieving superior predictive accuracy ( R 2 = 0.90) compared to multiple linear regression ( R 2 = 0.69). Through Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) analysis, soil total Cd (mean |SHAP| value, 0.20) and pH (0.08) were identified as key determinants, while soil Mn (0.06) and Zn (0.03) concentrations as minor determinants for wheat grain Cd. Soil Cd had a positive effect on grain Cd concentration, whereas soil pH, Mn and Zn showed negative effects. Extending the XGBoost model with 373 nation-scale paired data confirmed its robustness ( R 2 = 0.86), and identified high-risk areas for Cd accumulation in southwest China and northwestern Henan province. An online application (https://wheat.cdpredict.cn) was developed for rapid Cd predictions in wheat. To ensure compliance with the wheat grain Cd limit of 0.1 mg/kg, soil Cd safety thresholds were established for different soil pH ranges. We further recommend that approximately 3.4% and 10.5% of cultivated soils should maintain Cd levels within 0.30 and 0.34 mg/kg, respectively. This interpretable ML model provides an actionable tool for managing soil contaminated with Cd to ensure the safe production of wheat.

items.summary_zh: 准确预测小麦籽粒中的镉 (Cd) 浓度对于确保食品安全和可持续农业至关重要。在这里，我们基于 1,339 个土壤-小麦谷物对的数据集，使用 9 种机器学习 (ML) 算法开发了一个预测模型，重点关注土壤特性。结果表明，eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) 模型优于其他模型，与多元线性回归 (R 2 = 0.69) 相比，实现了更高的预测精度 (R 2 = 0.90)。通过 Shapley 加性解释 (SHAP) 分析，土壤总 Cd（平均 |SHAP| 值，0.20）和 pH（0.08）被确定为关键决定因素，而土壤 Mn (0.06) 和 Zn (0.03) 浓度被确定为小麦籽粒 Cd 的次要决定因素。土壤Cd对籽粒Cd浓度有正向影响，而土壤pH、Mn和Zn则显示负向影响。利用373个全国范围的配对数据扩展XGBoost模型证实了其稳健性（R 2 = 0.86），并确定了中国西南地区和河南省西北部的Cd积累高风险区域。开发了一个在线应用程序 (https://wheat.cdpredict.cn)，用于快速预测小麦中的镉。为确保符合小麦籽粒镉限量……

items.title: Investigating the drivers of negative diversity-invasibility relationship: The role of nutrient availability, allelopathy, soil biota, and soil legacy effects
items.title_zh: 调查负多样性-入侵关系的驱动因素：养分有效性、化感作用、土壤生物群和土壤遗留效应的作用
items.summary: • Nutrient addition, allelopathy, soil biota, and soil legacy effects impacted plant growth. • Allelopathy and soil microbes were key factors in invasion resistance. • A high diversity of native plants suppressed the growth of invasive species, possibly by promoting a richer community of soil microbes. • Addition of activated carbon increased biomass of the low-diversity plant communities, indicating strong allelopathic interactions in such communities. • Invasive species exhibited similar growth in soils conditioned by low- and high-diversity native communities. The successful establishment of invasive plant species depends on their invasiveness traits and the invasibility of the recipient native plant communities. Elton's diversity-invasibility hypothesis proposes that native plant communities with higher species diversity should be less susceptible to invasion by exotic plant species than those with lower species diversity. However, the exact ecological mechanisms driving this negative diversity-invasibility relationship and their relative importance within a single invaded ecosystem remain unclear. In this study, we tested whether soil nutrient availability, allelopathy, soil biota, and soil legacy effects can all influence the diversity-invasibility relationship within the same ecological system comprising invasive and co-occurring native plant species. We conducted four multi-species greenhouse experiments using 14 invasive and 20 native plant species that co-occur in grasslands in China. The results show that nutrient addition, allelopathy, soil microbiota, and soil…

items.title: KREEP materials recorded in impact glasses of Chang’e-6 regolith returned from the South Pole-Aitken Basin
items.title_zh: 从南极-艾特肯盆地返回的嫦娥六号风化层撞击玻璃中记录的KREEP材料
items.summary: The Chang’e-6 mission achieved the first-ever sample return from the lunar farside. The landing site is located within the South Pole–Aitken (SPA) basin, which is the largest and oldest impact structure on the Moon. In this study, approximately 2,360 glass beads were separated from 5 g of lunar soil. Among them, 640 homogeneous impact-generated glass beads were selected to investigate the compositional characteristics of the sampling site and surrounding unsampled regions. The average major element composition of these glass beads deviates significantly from that of local basalt, and the TiO 2 content displays a bimodal distribution (∼3.1 wt% and ∼0.6 wt%), indicating substantial input from low-Ti exotic components. Based on their major element characteristics, 116 glass beads were further analyzed for trace elements. Four chemically distinct types of glass beads were identified: regolith-like (n = 37), basalt-like (n = 2), feldspathic-like (n = 18) and KREEP-like (n = 27). The first two types have an origin from local regolith and basalt. The feldspathic-like glasses are characterized by high Al, low Ti, high Mg#, and significantly positive Eu anomalies, indicating that their source materials most likely originated from noritic lithologies formed through differentiation of impact melt within the SPA basin. The KREEP-like glasses are enriched in incompatible trace elements, exhibit high 87 Rb/ 86 Sr ratios, and show distinctly negative Eu anomalies, which point to the incorporation of KREEP components in their source materials. items.summary_zh: 嫦娥六号任务实现了月球背面首次采样返回。着陆点位于南极-艾特肯（SPA）盆地内，这是月球上最大、最古老的撞击结构。在这项研究中，从 5 克月壤中分离出了大约 2,360 颗玻璃珠。其中，选择了640颗均匀的撞击产生的玻璃珠来研究采样点和周围未采样区域的成分特征。这些玻璃珠的平均主要元素组成与当地玄武岩的平均主要元素组成明显不同，并且TiO 2 含量呈现双峰分布（~3.1 wt%和~0.6 wt%），表明大量来自低钛外来成分的输入。根据主要元素特征，进一步分析了 116 颗玻璃珠的微量元素。鉴定出四种化学性质不同类型的玻璃珠：类风化层 (n = 37)、类玄武岩 (n = 2)、类长石 (n = 18) 和类克里普 (n = 27)。前两种类型起源于当地的风化层和玄武岩。类长石玻璃具有高Al、低Ti、高Mg#和显着正Eu异常的特征，表明其来源…

items.title: Liquid phase delamination of non-van der Waal two-dimensional sheets of tin monoxide for flexible and long lifespan sodium-ion batteries
items.title_zh: 用于柔性长寿命钠离子电池的非范德华二维一氧化锡片的液相分层
items.summary: Sodium-ion batteries are attractive alternatives to Li-ion batteries, but typically suffer from slow redox kinetics and short cycle life. These problems arise mainly from the much larger radius of the sodium ion, which results in slow diffusion and causes a large volume change during operation. Using the two-dimensional (2D) sheet form of redox-active materials with an increased number of exposed reactive sites on the surface could mitigate volume expansion while improving rate capabilities. Based on our recently developed strategy where we used a physical calendering method to weaken non-van der Waals (vdW) interactions, in this work we demonstrate liquid phase delamination of SnO to enable facile mass production of few-layer sheets. The 2D morphology allowed highly reversible redox reactions due to the greater exposure of Sn atoms. Thus, free-standing films formed from SnO sheets infiltrated with carbon nanotubes as conductive fillers exhibited excellent rate capabilities (620 and 432 mAh g −1 at 115 and 1150 mA g −1 respectively) and long cycle-life performance (77% of the initial capacity after 2000 cycles at 1150 mA g −1 ). Pouch full-cells assembled with Na 0.61 Fe[Fe(CN) 6 ] 0.94 cathode successfully powered electronic devices, e.g. light emitting diode lamps, even when bent or folded. This work thus proposes a new way to the mass production of non-vdW SnO sheets and highlights the potential of thinned non-vdW materials for electrochemical energy storage.

items.summary_zh: 钠离子电池是锂离子电池有吸引力的替代品，但通常存在氧化还原动力学缓慢和循环寿命短的问题。这些问题主要是由于钠离子的半径较大，导致扩散缓慢并在操作过程中引起较大的体积变化。使用二维 (2D) 片状氧化还原活性材料以及增加表面暴露的反应位点数量可以减轻体积膨胀，同时提高倍率能力。基于我们最近开发的策略，我们使用物理压延方法来削弱非范德华 (vdW) 相互作用，在这项工作中，我们演示了 SnO 的液相分层，以实现少层片材的轻松批量生产。由于锡原子的暴露量更大，二维形态允许高度可逆的氧化还原反应。因此，由渗透碳纳米管作为导电填料的SnO片形成的自支撑薄膜表现出优异的倍率性能（在115和1150 mA g -1 下分别为620和432 mAh g -1 ）和长循环寿命性能（在1150 mA g -1 下循环2000次后初始容量的77％）。用 Na 0.61 Fe[Fe(CN) 6… 组装的袋装全电池

items.title: Melatonin ameliorates inflammation-induced mitochondrial dysfunction and cementoblastic differentiation in cells by regulating the METTL3/LINC01444/HSPD1 axis
items.title_zh: 褪黑素通过调节 METTL3/LINC01444/HSPD1 轴改善细胞中炎症诱导的线粒体功能障碍和成牙骨质细胞分化
items.summary: Inflammation-induced mitochondrial dysfunction functionally impairs periodontal ligament stem cells (PDLSCs) and hinders their therapeutic efficacy in periodontal regeneration. Melatonin, a mitochondrion-targeted molecule, is considered a promising anti-inflammatory agent in therapeutics, but whether melatonin protects PDLSC cementoblastic differentiation against inflammation-induced damage and the underlying mechanisms of this function remain unclear. This study confirmed that melatonin rescues PDLSC cementoblastic differentiation under inflammatory conditions and that melatonin-induced recovery is linked to ameliorated mitochondrial function in cells. Next, through lncRNA microarray analysis, mass spectrometry and functional studies, an interaction between LINC01444 and HSPD1 was identified as a mechanism mediating these melatonin-induced mitochondrial changes. In this context, suppressing LINC01444 was found to increase the total and cytoplasmic HSPD1 protein levels, and in turn, mitochondrial function improved. We further revealed the upstream mechanism by which melatonin inhibits the m6A modification of LINC01444, thereby decreasing its stability and expression. Our data indicate that LINC01444 is a key target involved in the restorative effects of melatonin on cellular mitochondrial function and cementoblastic differentiation. Melatonin inhibits LINC01444 m6A modification to maintain its stability and expression and prevents LINC01444 from interacting with HSPD1 to exert its damaging effects on PDLSCs.

items.summary: • Bidirectional MEMS array enables precise hippocampal recording/stimulation (80 μm). • 7-day stimulated learning achieves comparable performance to 14-day natural spatial navigation. • 72mV/90Hz stimulation boosts spatial information while reducing place field size. • Closed-loop system enables real-time detection and modulation of place cell activation patterns. • Framework advances cognitive prosthetics for memory enhancement. Spatial cognition plays a critical role in survival and development, yet effective technologies for enhancing this capability remain scarce. This study investigates a neural modulation approach targeting place cells - specialized hippocampal neurons responsible for spatial representation. Bidirectional microelectrode arrays with micron-level spatial precision were developed using micro-electromechanical systems technology, integrating detection, stimulation, and shielding functions. The array enables simultaneous electrophysiological recording and confined electrical stimulation while minimizing signal interference. A modified Y-maze behavioral paradigm and electrical stimulation protocol were designed to assess spatial learning enhancement. Experimental results demonstrated that mice receiving 72 mV/90 Hz electrical stimulation through the array achieved comparable place cell activation patterns and behavioral performance after one week of training to control mice requiring two weeks of conventional training. Quantitative analysis revealed a 19.7% increase in learning trajectory success rate, 50.2% increase in spatial information, and 25.1% reduc…

items.title: Multiple waves of westward dry-land agriculture expansions along the East Silk Road during the Neolithic age
items.title_zh: 新石器时代沿东方丝绸之路多次旱地农业向西扩展
items.summary: The intersection between ancient agriculture, population, and language during the Neolithic is a widely researched topic across multiple disciplines. In East Asia, multiple waves of westward expansions of dry-land agriculture based on millet cultivation along the Eastern Silk Road (ESR) during the Neolithic have been identified; however, the timing and scope of these expansions remain unresolved. This is due to the uncertain timing of the earliest millet cultivation and a lack of research on the spatial-temporal patterns of this dry-land agriculture expansion. At the Dadiwan site, located in the ESR, abundant charred millet remains have been identified from associated materials in cultural layers between ∼7900 and 4800. Critically, however, direct radiocarbon dates of millet grains remain absent. Based on systematic archeobotanical analysis from the 2014-2015 excavation of the Dadiwan site, 29 samples of charred millet remains were collected and directly AMS radiocarbon dated. This yielded the earliest direct date of millet cultivation (∼7900 BP), both in the Dadiwan and across the ESR. Most of the new direct dates conflict with the previously assumed ages of the cultural strata from which the millet remains were unearthed. This highlights the importance of directly dating charred seed remains from archeological sites when exploring the chronologies of agricultural systems. We compare this new data with previously published dates, the stable isotope analysis of human diet, and archeological evidence, detecting four waves of westward expansion of dry-land agriculture along…

items.summary_zh: 新石器时代古代农业、人口和语言之间的交叉是跨多个学科广泛研究的课题。在东亚，新石器时代沿东方丝绸之路（ESR）出现了多轮以小米种植为基础的旱地农业向西扩张的浪潮；然而，这些扩张的时间和范围仍未解决。这是由于最早的小米种植时间不确定以及缺乏对旱地农业扩张的时空格局的研究。在位于 ESR 的大地湾遗址，从距今 7900 年至 4800 年文化层的相关材料中发现了丰富的烧焦的小米遗骸。然而，重要的是，仍然缺乏小米谷物的直接放射性碳年代测定。基于2014-2015年大地湾遗址发掘的系统考古植物学分析，收集了29个烧焦的小米遗骸样本，并直接进行了AMS放射性碳测年。这得出了大地湾和东沙地区最早的小米种植直接日期（距今7900年）。大多数新的直接日期与先前假设的文化阶层年龄相冲突……

items.title: Network structure governs Drosophila brain functionality
items.title_zh: 网络结构控制果蝇大脑功能
items.summary: How intelligence emerges in living beings is a fundamental but largely unanswered question in neuroscience. To address this challenge, we leveraged the largest available data set of adult Drosophila connectome, and constructed a comprehensive computational framework using simplified neuronal activation mechanisms to mimic the observed activation behavior within the connectome. The results revealed that even with rudimentary neuronal activation mechanisms, models grounded in real neuronal network structures can generate activation patterns strikingly analogous to those observed in the actual brain. A significant discovery was the consistency of activation patterns across various neuronal dynamic models with the same network structure. This consistency results therefore underscore the pivotal role of network topology in neural information processing, but challenge the prevailing view that solely relies on neuron count or complex individual neuron dynamics. Further analysis demonstrated a near-complete separation of the visual and the olfactory systems at the network level. Moreover, we found that the network distance, rather than spatial distance, is the primary determinant of activation patterns, and also that a reconnect rate of at least 1 o / o o was sufficient to disrupt the previously observed activation patterns. We also observed synergistic effects between the brain hemispheres: Even with unilateral input stimuli, visual-related neurons in both hemispheres were activated, highlighting the importance of interhemispheric communication. All these findings suggest the cru…
items.title_en: Network structure governs Drosophila brain functionality
items.title_bilingual: 网络结构控制果蝇大脑功能 / Network structure governs Drosophila brain functionality
items.summary_zh: 生物体的智力是如何产生的，这是神经科学中一个基本但基本上尚未得到解答的问题。为了应对这一挑战，我们利用成年果蝇连接组的最大可用数据集，并使用简化的神经元激活机制构建了一个全面的计算框架，以模拟连接组内观察到的激活行为。结果表明，即使具有基本的神经元激活机制，基于真实神经元网络结构的模型也可以生成与实际大脑中观察到的激活模式极为相似的激活模式。一个重要的发现是具有相同网络结构的各种神经元动态模型的激活模式的一致性。因此，这种一致性结果强调了网络拓扑在神经信息处理中的关键作用，但挑战了仅依赖于神经元计数或复杂的个体神经元动力学的流行观点。进一步的分析表明视觉和嗅觉系统在网络层面上几乎完全分离。此外，我们发现网络距离，而不是空间距离，是活动的主要决定因素……

items.title: Novel function of Teleost skin: Antigen excretion across the epidermis mediated by secretory IgM in vivo model of flounder (Paralichthys olivaceus)
items.title_zh: 硬骨鱼皮肤的新功能：比目鱼（牙鲆）分泌型IgM体内模型介导的表皮抗原排泄
items.summary: • An in-vivo model of flounder with pre-generated anti-OVA-specific IgM and pIgR was developed. • Circulating OVA antigen diffused into skin dermis and were excreted into mucus by SIgM within 24 h. • The specific IgM mediated transepithelial excretion of OVA in the form of pIgR-IgM-OVA complex. • Teleost skin had evolved a pIgR-mediated IgM-antigen complex transcytosis mechanism. Teleost skin fits the concept of “mucosa” better than that of terrestrial animals and exhibits gut-like mucosal immune responses. While the immune elimination of antigens by secretory IgA is well described in the mammalian intestine, it remains poorly understood in lower vertebrates. We previously demonstrated that flounder ( Paralichthys olivaceus ) have evolved a mammalian-like polymeric immunoglobulin receptor (pIgR)-mediated antigen excretion function in the hindgut. However, it remains unclear whether this mechanism is also applicable to the skin. In the present study, we developed an in vivo model of flounder with pre-generated anti-OVA-specific IgM and pIgR, using adjuvanted OVA as the antigen and BSA as the control. After the immunized OVA disappeared from the fish body at week 4, adjuvant-free OVA was injected into the bloodstream via the tail vein. We found that OVA diffused from the bloodstream to the dermis and was gradually transported across the epidermal cells into the skin mucus within 24 h. In contrast, in the absence of specific antibodies, OVA accumulated solely around the vascular network in the dermis. The transepithelial trafficking of OVA was confirmed to occur via pIgR-IgM-…

items.summary_zh: • 开发了具有预先生成的抗OVA 特异性IgM 和pIgR 的比目鱼体内模型。 • 循环OVA抗原扩散到皮肤真皮中，并在24小时内通过SIgM排泄到粘液中。 • 特异性IgM 介导的OVA 以pIgR-IgM-OVA 复合物形式跨上皮排泄。 • 硬骨鱼皮肤已进化出pIgR介导的IgM-抗原复合物转胞吞机制。硬骨鱼皮肤比陆生动物更符合“粘膜”的概念，并表现出类似肠道的粘膜免疫反应。虽然分泌型 IgA 对抗原的免疫消除在哺乳动物肠道中已得到充分描述，但在低等脊椎动物中仍然知之甚少。我们之前证明，牙鲆（Paralichthys olivaceus）在后肠中进化出了类似哺乳动物的聚合免疫球蛋白受体（pIgR）介导的抗原排泄功能。然而，目前尚不清楚这种机制是否也适用于皮肤。在本研究中，我们开发了一种比目鱼体内模型，该模型具有预先生成的抗 OVA 特异性 IgM 和 pIgR，使用佐剂 OVA 作为抗原，BSA 作为对照。第 4 周，免疫后的 OVA 从鱼体内消失后，不含佐剂的 OV…

items.title: Nucleon charge and magnetisation distributions: Flavour separation and zeroes
items.title_zh: 核子电荷和磁化强度分布：风味分离和零点
items.summary: A symmetry-preserving truncation of the quantum field equations describing hadron properties is used to deliver parameter-free predictions for all nucleon elastic electromagnetic form factors and their flavour separation to large values of momentum transfer, Q 2 . The proton electric form factor, G E p , possesses a zero, whereas that of the neutron, G E n , does not. The difference owes to the behaviour of the Pauli form factor of the proton’s singly-represented valence d -quark. Consequently, G E n > G E p on a material large- Q 2 domain. These predictions can be tested in modern experiments.
items.title_en: Nucleon charge and magnetisation distributions: Flavour separation and zeroes
items.title_bilingual: 核子电荷和磁化强度分布：风味分离和零点 / Nucleon charge and magnetisation distributions: Flavour separation and zeroes
items.summary_zh: 描述强子性质的量子场方程的保对称截断用于为所有核子弹性电磁形状因子及其对大动量传递值 Q 2 的风味分离提供无参数预测。质子电形状因子 G E p 为零，而中子电形状因子 GE n 则不然。这种差异归因于质子单一代表价 d 夸克的泡利形状因子的行为。因此，在材料大 Q 2 域上，GE n > GE p。这些预测可以在现代实验中得到检验。

items.title: Observation of high-order quantum Pancharatnam-Berry phase with structured photons
items.title_zh: 用结构光子观测高阶量子 Pancharatnam-Berry 相
items.summary: When a quantum system evolves so that it returns to its initial state, it will acquire a geometric phase acting as a memory of the transformation of a physical system, which has been experimentally measured in a variety of physical systems. In optics, the most prominent example is the Pancharatnam-Berry (PB) phase. Recent technological advances in phase and polarization structure have led to the discovery of high-order PB phases with structured light fields. The study on the high-order PB phase is limited in the context of elementary quantum states of light, especially in the case of photon number states. Here, we experimentally investigate the differences of high-order PB phases between single-photon and N00N states. Our results show that the PB phase, like the dynamic phase, can also be doubled under two-photon states, which can greatly improve the phase sensitivity for greater N in N00N states and high-order structured photons. This may show some implications for quantum precision measurement and quantum state engineering based on geometric phase.
items.title_en: Observation of high-order quantum Pancharatnam-Berry phase with structured photons
items.title_bilingual: 用结构光子观测高阶量子 Pancharatnam-Berry 相 / Observation of high-order quantum Pancharatnam-Berry phase with structured photons
items.summary_zh: 当量子系统演化并返回其初始状态时，它将获得几何相位，作为物理系统变换的记忆，这已在各种物理系统中通过实验测量到。在光学中，最突出的例子是 Pancharatnam-Berry (PB) 相。相位和偏振结构方面的最新技术进步导致了具有结构光场的高阶 PB 相的发现。对高阶PB相的研究仅限于光的基本量子态，特别是光子数态的情况。在这里，我们通过实验研究了单光子态和 N00N 态之间高阶 PB 相的差异。我们的结果表明，PB 相位与动态相位一样，在双光子态下也可以加倍，这可以大大提高 N00N 态中更大 N 和高阶结构光子的相位灵敏度。这可能对基于几何相位的量子精密测量和量子态工程产生一些影响。

items.title: Opposing effects of increasing numbers of added resources on producer richness but not biomass in terrestrial and aquatic ecosystems
items.title_zh: 增加资源数量的增加对生产者丰富度产生相反影响，但对陆地和水生生态系统的生物量没有影响
items.summary: While resource enrichment can shape community structure and ecosystem functioning, how species diversity and biomass production respond to the input of multiple resources across habitats-particularly between terrestrial and aquatic ecosystems-remains poorly understood. Using a meta-analysis, we show that multiple resource addition consistently increased primary production regardless of the study system, indicative of widespread resource co-limitation. Multiple resource addition, however, differentially affected plant and algal richness. As the number of added resources increased, terrestrial plant richness tended to decline, which was best explained by diminished niche dimensions and soil acidification. In contrast, aquatic algal richness tended to increase with the number of added resources, which is in agreement with the benthic model for coexistence. Resource identity also mattered as nutrient and water addition had opposing effects on terrestrial plant richness, and nitrogen addition had a weaker positive effect on algal richness than phosphorus and micronutrients. These findings suggest that different ecological mechanisms may regulate terrestrial and aquatic producer diversity, with important implications for understanding biodiversity responses to environmental change.
items.title_en: Opposing effects of increasing numbers of added resources on producer richness but not biomass in terrestrial and aquatic ecosystems
items.title_bilingual: 增加资源数量的增加对生产者丰富度产生相反影响，但对陆地和水生生态系统的生物量没有影响 / Opposing effects of increasing numbers of added resources on producer richness but not biomass in terrestrial and aquatic ecosystems
items.summary_zh: 虽然资源富集可以塑造群落结构和生态系统功能，但物种多样性和生物量生产如何响应跨栖息地（特别是陆地和水生生态系统之间）多种资源的输入仍然知之甚少。通过荟萃分析，我们表明，无论研究系统如何，多种资源的添加都会持续增加初级生产力，这表明广泛的资源共同限制。然而，多种资源的添加对植物和藻类丰富度的影响不同。随着新增资源数量的增加，陆地植物丰富度趋于下降，最好的解释是生态位规模缩小和土壤酸化。相比之下，水生藻类丰富度随着资源数量的增加而增加，这与底栖共存模型是一致的。资源特性也很重要，因为养分和水的添加对陆地植物丰富度具有相反的影响，而氮的添加对藻类丰富度的积极影响弱于磷和微量营养素。这些发现表明，不同的生态机制可能调节陆地和水生生产者的多样性……

items.title: Oscillatory phase transition induced structural extension during iron oxide reduction
items.title_zh: 氧化铁还原过程中振荡相变诱导结构延伸
items.summary: Probing the molecular-level redox behavior and mechanism of oxides is essential to developing innovative applications in different fields such as catalysis, but remains a challenge for the scientific community. Using in-situ transmission electron microscopy, here we provide an overall reduction view of single-crystalline α-Fe2O3 with different characteristics from the conventional wisdom of oxide reduction. Specifically, the formation of epitaxial nanoislands with concomitant oscillatory phase transitions (α-Fe2O3→defective γ-Fe2O3→α-Fe2O3) at the subsurface is observed during reduction. The dynamic equilibrium of lattice oxygen at the surface and the limited oxygen replenishment from the deep layer drive the α-Fe2O3→defective γ-Fe2O3 transformation in the subsurface, while the polymorphic transition (defective γ-Fe2O3→α-Fe2O3) spontaneously occurs under heating conditions. Such oscillatory phase transition is accompanied by the release of asymmetric stress, inducing the extension of epitaxial nanoislands. Our work highlights the complexity of reduction by providing an integral picture of oxide reduction, which contributes to the understanding of the site evolution of oxide-based catalysts in their working state.
items.title_en: Oscillatory phase transition induced structural extension during iron oxide reduction
items.title_bilingual: 氧化铁还原过程中振荡相变诱导结构延伸 / Oscillatory phase transition induced structural extension during iron oxide reduction
items.summary_zh: 探索氧化物的分子级氧化还原行为和机制对于开发催化等不同领域的创新应用至关重要，但对科学界来说仍然是一个挑战。使用原位透射电子显微镜，我们提供了单晶 α-Fe2O3 的整体还原视图，其具有与传统氧化物还原智慧不同的特性。具体而言，在还原过程中观察到在地下形成了外延纳米岛，并伴随振荡相变（α-Fe2O3→缺陷γ-Fe2O3→α-Fe2O3）。表面晶格氧的动态平衡和深层有限的氧补充驱动了亚表面的α-Fe2O3→缺陷型γ-Fe2O3转变，而多晶型转变（缺陷型γ-Fe2O3→α-Fe2O3）在加热条件下自发发生。这种振荡相变伴随着不对称应力的释放，从而诱导外延纳米岛的延伸。我们的工作通过提供氧化物还原的整体图来强调还原的复杂性，这有助于理解氧化物基的位点演化……

items.title: Performance of lunar shell structure for moonbase subjected to low gravity coupled with changing temperature
items.title_zh: 月球基地月壳结构在低重力和温度变化下的性能
items.summary: Temperature variations on the lunar surface can cause significant thermal stress and increase energy consumption within a lunar base. Thus, studying the thermal behavior of lunar structures over time and space is crucial. This study utilizes classical thermomechanical coupling simulations to develop a comprehensive methodology for assessing the thermal performance of lunar shell structures. The model incorporates realistic assumptions about critical loads and boundary conditions and uses the real properties of regolith-based construction materials as input parameters. Using this method, the study simulates 36 scenarios for shell structures, including three types of structures, four latitudes, and three time periods. The temperature field, heat loss, and thermal stress for each scenario are calculated, and the overall trends and specific cases are analyzed. These results can inform further recommendations for the architectural design of lunar shell structures and the selection of construction materials.
items.title_en: Performance of lunar shell structure for moonbase subjected to low gravity coupled with changing temperature
items.title_bilingual: 月球基地月壳结构在低重力和温度变化下的性能 / Performance of lunar shell structure for moonbase subjected to low gravity coupled with changing temperature
items.summary_zh: 月球表面的温度变化会导致显着的热应力并增加月球基地内的能源消耗。因此，研究月球结构随时间和空间的热行为至关重要。这项研究利用经典的热机耦合模拟开发了一种评估月壳结构热性能的综合方法。该模型结合了关于临界载荷和边界条件的现实假设，并使用基于风化层的建筑材料的真实属性作为输入参数。利用该方法，研究模拟了 36 个壳结构场景，包括三种类型的结构、四个纬度和三个时间段。计算每种场景的温度场、热损失和热应力，并分析总体趋势和具体案例。这些结果可以为月壳结构的建筑设计和建筑材料的选择提供进一步的建议。

items.title: Physics-driven deep learning photoacoustic tomography
items.title_zh: 物理驱动的深度学习光声断层扫描
items.summary: Photoacoustic tomography (PAT) is a rapidly emerging biomedical imaging modality. To achieve high-performance imaging, signal acquisition in PAT should ideally meet conditions such as full-view detection and dense sampling. However, these circumstances are rarely met in reality, leading to the ill-posed problem of image reconstruction from incomplete projections. Here we propose a physics-driven deep learning-based filtered back projection (dFBP) framework to address this important challenge. The dFBP network is inspired and constructed based on the physical model of the analytical filtered back projection algorithm and consists of a filtering module, a back-projection module, and a fusion module connected in cascade. The dFBP network is driven by physics and is thus interpretable and easy to train while being highly robust and versatile. Numerical and experimental validation on animals and humans show that dFBP-based PAT can achieve direct signal-to-image transformation with enhanced accuracy and reconstruct high-quality, artifact-suppressed images from sparse-view, limited-view, and acoustic heterogeneity-contaminated projections. The proposed dFBP provides a practical solution for high-performance PAT imaging under non-ideal conditions.
items.title_en: Physics-driven deep learning photoacoustic tomography
items.title_bilingual: 物理驱动的深度学习光声断层扫描 / Physics-driven deep learning photoacoustic tomography
items.summary_zh: 光声断层扫描（PAT）是一种快速新兴的生物医学成像方式。为了实现高性能成像，PAT中的信号采集应满足全视角检测和密集采样等条件。然而，这些情况在现实中很少遇到，导致不完全投影图像重建的不适定问题。在这里，我们提出了一种物理驱动的基于深度学习的滤波反投影（dFBP）框架来应对这一重要挑战。 dFBP网络是基于解析滤波反投影算法物理模型的启发和构建的，由级联的滤波模块、反投影模块和融合模块组成。 dFBP 网络由物理驱动，因此可解释且易于训练，同时具有高度鲁棒性和多功能性。对动物和人类的数值和实验验证表明，基于 dFBP 的 PAT 可以实现直接信号到图像的转换，且精度更高，并从稀疏视图、有限视图和声学异质性污染的投影中重建高质量、伪影抑制的图像。所提出的 dFBP 提供了一个实用的解决方案……

items.title: Polarization control enabled by on-chip three-dimensional rotator
items.title_zh: 通过片上三维旋转器实现偏振控制
items.summary: Precise polarization control is fundamental for applications such as optical communication and quantum information processing. Femtosecond-laser written photonic integrated circuits (PICs) offer the ability to both maintain and manipulate the state of polarization (SOP) on-chip, making them a promising platform for integrated and flexible polarization control. However, current polarization control devices are either inefficient in rotating polarization or limited to adjusting the birefringence and optical axis orientation of the waveguides. In this study, we introduce and demonstrate a new type of three-dimensional polarization rotator, built from composite waveguides with varied optical axis orientations. By varying the rotation length and angle of the rotators, we efficiently rotate the horizontal and vertical polarization states between 5° and 180°, achieving output SOPs with a linear polarization degree exceeding 99.5 %. Moreover, when other linear polarization states were introduced, the rotators not only preserved the rotation angle but also enabled additional control over the ellipticity of the output SOPs, ranging from -6° to 7° These novel waveguide rotators allow for both efficient polarization rotation and ellipticity control, marking a major advancement in on-chip polarization management and paving the way for full polarization utilization.
items.title_en: Polarization control enabled by on-chip three-dimensional rotator
items.title_bilingual: 通过片上三维旋转器实现偏振控制 / Polarization control enabled by on-chip three-dimensional rotator
items.summary_zh: 精确的偏振控制是光通信和量子信息处理等应用的基础。飞秒激光写入光子集成电路 (PIC) 具有维持和操纵片上偏振态 (SOP) 的能力，使其成为集成灵活偏振控制的有前途的平台。然而，当前的偏振控制装置要么在旋转偏振方面效率低下，要么仅限于调整波导的双折射和光轴方向。在这项研究中，我们介绍并演示了一种新型三维偏振旋转器，该旋转器由具有不同光轴方向的复合波导制成。通过改变旋转器的旋转长度和角度，我们有效地在5°和180°之间旋转水平和垂直偏振态，实现线性偏振度超过99.5%的输出SOP。此外，当引入其他线性偏振态时，旋转器不仅保留了旋转角度，而且还能够对输出 SOP 的椭圆度进行额外控制，范围从 -6° 到 7° 这些新颖的波导旋转器允许机器人…

items.title: Pre-implantation embryo metabolism identified by PEMA reveals endogenous lactate insufficiency contributes to pre-implantation development arrest
items.title_zh: PEMA 鉴定的植入前胚胎代谢揭示内源性乳酸不足导致植入前发育停滞
items.summary: Metabolism is a major regulator of pre-implantation embryonic development, but pre-implantation development arrest (PIDA) due to abnormal metabolisms remains ambiguous. By estimating a weight for each metabolic reaction using the translatome data, we developed a computational tool to perform pre-implantation embryos metabolic analysis (PEMA), and uncovered that the embryos exist in high activities of lactate dehydrogenase and lactate synthesis when major zygotic genome activation (ZGA) occurs in humans and mice. The insufficiency of endogenous lactate was predicted by PEMA in human 8-cell PIDA and corrected human tripronuclear (ch3PN) embryos, which was coordinated with failed H3K18lac and major ZGA. In transcriptomes, the human PIDA embryos resembled endogenous lactate-deprived mouse embryos. Lac-CoA addition could promote H3K18lac, major ZGA, and ch3PN pre-implantation development. Collectively, our study decodes the metabolic abnormalities in human PIDA embryos. The experimental validation suggests that PEMA offers an opportunity to study metabolic heterogeneity in early embryos.
items.title_en: Pre-implantation embryo metabolism identified by PEMA reveals endogenous lactate insufficiency contributes to pre-implantation development arrest
items.title_bilingual: PEMA 鉴定的植入前胚胎代谢揭示内源性乳酸不足导致植入前发育停滞 / Pre-implantation embryo metabolism identified by PEMA reveals endogenous lactate insufficiency contributes to pre-implantation development arrest
items.summary_zh: 代谢是植入前胚胎发育的主要调节因素，但由于代谢异常导致的植入前发育停滞（PIDA）仍然不明确。通过使用翻译组数据估计每个代谢反应的权重，我们开发了一种计算工具来执行植入前胚胎代谢分析（PEMA），并发现当人类和小鼠发生主要合子基因组激活（ZGA）时，胚胎存在高活性的乳酸脱氢酶和乳酸合成。 PEMA 在人 8 细胞 PIDA 中预测内源性乳酸不足，并校正人三核 (ch3PN) 胚胎，这与失败的 H3K18lac 和主要 ZGA 相协调。在转录组中，人类 PIDA 胚胎类似于内源性缺乏乳酸的小鼠胚胎。添加 Lac-CoA 可以促进 H3K18lac、主要 ZGA 和 ch3PN 植入前发育。总的来说，我们的研究解码了人类 PIDA 胚胎中的代谢异常。实验验证表明 PEMA 提供了研究早期胚胎代谢异质性的机会。

items.title: Profiling adaptive immunity: A quantitative framework for immune repertoire dynamics and clinical diagnostics
items.title_zh: 分析适应性免疫：免疫库动态和临床诊断的定量框架
items.summary: While immune repertoire (IR) dynamics encode critical disease signatures, existing models fail to capture the non-equilibrium processes that govern clonal selection and somatic hypermutation (SHM). We develop a biophysical framework that mathematically reconstructs IR evolution through energy landscape optimization, where 1) clonal emergence probabilities map to metastable states, 2) repertoire transitions obey non-equilibrium dynamics, and 3) inter-IR distances quantify the distribution transformation costs via optimal transport theory. This model enables macroscopic immune state detection from 10k cells by resolving critical fluctuations in sparse sampling regimes. Experimental validation across murine/human cohorts demonstrates precise unsupervised stratification of immune stages and disease states without prior clinical annotations. By bridging stochastic SHM kinetics with deterministic repertoire shifts, our approach establishes quantitative metrics for tracking immunological trajectories and pathological progression. This paradigm shift from static pattern recognition to dynamic process decoding empowers sensitive immunomonitoring and personalized therapeutic design through ultra-low-input clinical sampling.
items.title_en: Profiling adaptive immunity: A quantitative framework for immune repertoire dynamics and clinical diagnostics
items.title_bilingual: 分析适应性免疫：免疫库动态和临床诊断的定量框架 / Profiling adaptive immunity: A quantitative framework for immune repertoire dynamics and clinical diagnostics
items.summary_zh: 虽然免疫组库（IR）动态编码关键疾病特征，但现有模型无法捕获控制克隆选择和体细胞超突变（SHM）的非平衡过程。我们开发了一个生物物理框架，通过能量景观优化在数学上重建IR演化，其中1）克隆出现概率映射到亚稳态，2）所有转换服从非平衡动力学，3）IR间距离通过最优传输理论量化分布转换成本。该模型通过解决稀疏采样方案中的关键波动，能够对 10k 个细胞进行宏观免疫状态检测。小鼠/人类队列的实验验证表明，无需事先临床注释即可对免疫阶段和疾病状态进行精确的无监督分层。通过将随机 SHM 动力学与确定性库变化联系起来，我们的方法建立了用于跟踪免疫轨迹和病理进展的定量指标。这种从静态模式识别到动态过程解码的范式转变通过……实现了灵敏的免疫监测和个性化治疗设计。
